content: When the user asks to change the Slack/Codex bot adapter code or refers to this assistant/bot code, use /Users/innei/git/innei-repo/slack-cc-bot as the codebase path.

User stopped the attempted search in codex-slack-pm2 and clarified that the assistant/bot code lives at /Users/innei/git/innei-repo/slack-cc-bot. Future adapter changes for this thread should use that path.
